steps.t: Elfmar remains ready, just north of the road fork at the north edge of Faldham. The defence against the White Hand forces has begun, and Thane Elfmar …
Elfmar remains ready, just north of the road fork at the north edge of Faldham. Thane Elfmar wishes to speak with you about the defences of Faldham.
Nothwulf can be found to the south-west, along the road near the southern farms. Elfmar has asked you to aid Nothwulf defend the southern perimeter.
Nothwulf can be found to the south-west, along the road near the southern farms. Nothwulf will need your aid to defend the southern perimeter.
Nothwulf awaits at the southern edge of Faldham. Nothwulf wishes to speak about the ongoing defence of the town.
Osin has approached Nothwulf from the west
Langfrith defends the gate to the mead hall of Faldham. Langfrith has been guarding the mead hall entrance, and Osin believes that he may need your as…
Elfmar and members of the Elfward await at the opening to the mead hall of Faldham. Elfmar and the Elfward must be notified that you have defeated the…
